description_long: This is a classic banker’s lamp featuring a polished brass base and frame with a distinctive green glass shade. The lamp has a rounded, tiered base that supports a vertical stem, which branches out into two curved arms holding the shade. The green glass shade is rectangular with rounded edges and sits horizontally, diffusing light downward. A pull chain hangs from beneath the shade, serving as the lamp’s switch. The brass components are highly reflective and smooth, giving the lamp an elegant, vintage appearance. This style is often found in libraries, offices, or upscale urban interiors.
description: A vintage-style banker’s lamp with a polished brass base and a green glass shade, featuring a pull chain switch and elegant curved arms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the green glass shade, the symmetrical brass arms, and the pull chain hanging on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the green glass shade and the vertical alignment of the brass stem and base.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the green glass shade and brass arms visible, but the pull chain is less prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the depth of the shade and the brass stem, with the pull chain now on the right.
